---
title: "The Team"
format: html
toc: false
---

## Meet the Team

<div style="display: flex; gap: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap;">

<!-- Gautamgovan -->
<div style="flex: 1 1 300px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px;">

### Gautamgovan Elangovan  
📧 gautamgovan@gmail.com  
🔗 [GitHub](https://github.com/govanzz)

**Role:** Predictive Modelling & System Integration  

Worked on developing machine learning models to predict customer satisfaction and transaction behaviour. Also handled website integration and deployment workflows.

</div>

<!-- Meng Ye -->
<div style="flex: 1 1 300px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px;">

### Ng Meng Ye  
📧 mengye1996@outlook.com  
🔗 [GitHub](https://github.com/ngmengye)

**Role:** Exploratory Data Analysis & Shiny Dashboard  

Led the development of the interactive dashboard, including statistical analysis modules and visualization design.

</div>

<!-- Chandru -->
<div style="flex: 1 1 300px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px;">

### Chandru Kolanchiyappan  
📧 kchandru2000@gmail.com  
🔗 [GitHub](https://github.com/chandrugtx8)

**Role:** Customer Segmentation (Clustering)  

Developed clustering models to identify user segments and contributed to integrating analytical outputs into the application.

</div>

</div>
